---
name: Proposed amendment
about: Suggest an amendment to the Collaboration Constitution
title: "[Amendment] "
labels: amendment
assignees: DougManuel
---

## Which part does this amendment touch?

<!--
Commitment number and name (e.g. "Commitment 3: Critical thinking and judgement"),
a section ("Preamble", "Commitments", "Companion documents", "Acknowledgements"),
or a structural element ("Layering", "Commitment ordering", "Companion documents").
-->

## What change do you propose?

<!-- The specific edit, rephrasing, addition, or removal. -->

## Why?

<!--
What experience, observation, or reasoning showed the need? Has the
current wording caused confusion, mis-application, or tension with
another principle? Be specific; amendments should be deliberate, not
impulsive.
-->

## Who would this affect?

<!--
My (Doug's) personal constitution? A team variant? Forks that have
adopted the structure? Keep in mind that amendments to the canonical
document do not automatically propagate to forks, but they do set a
pattern.
-->

## What's the evidence?

<!--
If relevant: a specific incident, a cited source, a counterexample. The
constitution is amended against evidence, not against impulse.
-->

## Proposed exact wording

<!--
If you're suggesting a specific edit, paste the before-and-after text
here. Otherwise a sketch is fine and we can iterate.
-->

**Before:**

> (current text)

**After:**

> (proposed text)
